name: overseas-social-visual-workflow
description: A Bailian CLI workflow that turns a social media brief into Instagram/Facebook image prompts, visuals, and publishing copy.

scripts.demo: node scripts/social-visual-pack.mjs --mock "帮我为一款夏季香氛产品生成 Instagram 和 Facebook 宣传图，风格高级清爽，目标用户是欧美年轻女性。"
scripts.check: node --check scripts/social-visual-pack.mjs && node --check scripts/run-samples.mjs && node --check scripts/server.mjs && node --check src/workflow.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/projects.mjs
